name: e2e-v2-foreach-reduce
description: Run v2 parallel JSON extraction, foreach concat expansion, and reduce over generated item tasks.

tasks.prompt: Reply exactly {"claims":["E2E_V2_FOREACH_A"]} and do not inspect or modify files.
Reply exactly {"claims":["E2E_V2_FOREACH_B"]} and do not inspect or modify files.

each.prompt: Reply exactly ${item}_VERIFIED and do not inspect or modify files.

stages.prompt: If the Source Stage Context includes E2E_V2_FOREACH_A_VERIFIED and E2E_V2_FOREACH_B_VERIFIED, reply exactly E2E_V2_FOREACH_REDUCE_OK. Otherwise reply exactly E2E_V2_FOREACH_REDUCE_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
